subject: [PATCH] mm/migrate_device: fix folio refcount leak on folio_split_unmapped failure

reviews.author: Joshua Hahn
reviews.summary: Agreed with Kiryl that additional cleanup may be possible in the future, but deemed the patch sufficient as a fix for the issue at hand.

2026-03-04.patch_summary: Fix for folio refcount leak on folio_split_unmapped failure, deemed acceptable by Joshua Hahn but potential for additional cleanup.
